Privacy Policy

Stone App Studio provides the different apps services.  Stone Apps studio always committed to protect the all personal information collected from users when you visit to our applications. We always conscious to protect your all personal information and we can not share your personal information to other without your permission because your privacy is more important for us. some of our apps need users permission for better working so you should be permittee it for better working but it does not get to access on your personal information or personal data. This kind of data is just for a better user experience. we will not share your personal information to any other third party. we always works as safeguard for privacy policy.
When you will use our applications information will never be collected automatically and programmatic without your permission

when you visit our sites and/or when you used our application. These permissions are not our need but these permissions are need of our application for best performance and to provide best services. For example Maps application need your current location, this current location is neither our need and nor we get users location to trace the privacy of user. it is just to find your nearby places. In the same way all other applications use many permissions in the same policy. That is why we will not share your current location or any other data to any other person without your permission.

Stone Apps Inc is providing GPS based and Apps for users. For better services Stone Apps Inc need some of these permissions in one app, usually our apps uses different permissions. Here is a list of permissions which our applications use for better user experience. This list is providing complete details of permissions for what purposes we use these permissions if this permission is being used in our apps.

Stone Apps Inc describes all permissions and policies on this page and requests to users to visit this page regularly. We will update our new permissions and policies on this page for complete guidance of users and to provide them complete security about all data which is in access of our apps.
Android Permissions:

For best performance and sometimes to perform a task applications need to get some android permissions. Its means these applications will access those services of your device. If you will permit these applications to access those permissions you will enjoy all the functionalities of the App and if due to some reasons you will deny these applications to access required permissions these apps will not work properly and you will not enjoy all the functionalities of application. It is detail of permissions which are being used in Live Street View.

Security:We value your trust in providing us Information, thus we are striving to use commercially acceptable means of protecting it. But remember that no method of transmission over the internet, or method of electronic storage is 100% secure and reliable, and we cannot guarantee its absolute security.

Children’s Privacy:These Services do not address anyone under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personally identifiable information from children under 13. In the case we discover that a child under 13 has provided us with personal information, we immediately delete this from our servers. If you are a parent or guardian and you are aware that your child has provided us with personal information, please contact us so that we will be able to do necessary actions according to your requirements.

Changes to This Privacy Policy:We may update our Privacy Policy from time to time. Thus, you are advised to review this page periodically for any changes. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page. These changes are effective immediately after they are posted on this page.
